_comment: Copy to config.json and edit, or just pass flags to install.py. All paths support ~ and are resolved to absolute at install time.
_dream_note: Nightly local-LLM consolidation ('dreaming') — a suggestions-only digest at _inbox/dreams/, reviewed via /dream review. Registered at 04:45, ~30min after the graph rebuild. Wants Ollama (without it only the LLM-free passes run). Separate opt-in from schedule_nightly_graph since it makes LLM calls (capped, but still real compute). Same as passing --schedule-dream.
_autopush_note: OFF by default. If true, adds a Stop hook that commits+pushes the vault to ITS OWN git remote at session end (allowlist staging — chats/ and _inbox/ can never be staged). Requires the vault to be a git repo with a remote. Same as passing --autopush.
_import_chats_nightly_note: OFF by default. If true (and you scheduled the nightly job), imports ALL your Claude Code transcripts into the vault so /mine-chats has input. This is a privacy choice — chats stay local and chats/ is gitignored, but enable it knowingly.
